channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Binance taps into Bitcoin holders’ hunger for yield with new covered call yield play
item.description: The product, called BTC Yield, is designed exclusively for people who already hold bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin's recent macro relief faces a challenge from Japanese interest rates
item.description: Japanese bond yields continue to rise, lifting their U.S. counterparts and posing a potential headwind for risk assets.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin and ether ETFs drew inflows on Monday
item.description: Spot bitcoin ETFs still lost a net $526.6 million over the shortened holiday week, an eighth straight week of negative flows.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
item.description: One crypto trader noted the $2 million loss could have been prevented had the victim read the transaction route before signing the transaction.

item.title: Yield Guild Games cuts 35 staff, shuts game publisher to focus on AI
item.description: Yield Guild Games said tough crypto and video game market conditions mean its YGG Play business is no longer commercially sustainable.

item.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale may give BTC a ‘durable bottom,’ Grayscale says
item.description: “Investors are now more confident about the instrument,” said Grayscale’s Zach Pandl regarding STRC, which reclaimed $90 for the first time in three weeks.

item.title: BONK faces $20 million treasury drain after attacker spends $4 million to pass malicious proposal
item.description: The attacker bought enough of the memecoin's tokens to pass a governance proposal that sent the group's holdings to a wallet they controlled, then began selling.

item.title: XRP stalls near $1.14 as breakout attempt struggles for volume
item.description: Buyers defended the session lows and pushed XRP back toward resistance, but muted overall volume left traders waiting for confirmation above $1.13-$1.14.

item.title: Bitcoin drops after a run at $64,000, shrugging off Strategy's $213 million BTC sale
item.description: The token touched $64,400 overnight before easing back, still up about 6% on the week. A fresh missile strike on a Qatari gas ship in the Strait of Hormuz lifted oil and tested the late-June peace deal as Asian tech sold off again.

item.title: Trump says he became ‘a big crypto guy’ partly for politics
item.description: US President Donald Trump once called Bitcoin “a scam,” but admitted on Monday that he got involved in crypto “a little bit for politics.”

item.title: L1s face decentralization 'tug-of-war' as adoption grows: Injective CEO
item.description: Blockchains will face increasing pressure to compromise on decentralization to meet user demand for speed and scalability, Injective CEO Eric Chen said.

item.title: US Bitcoin reserve hits snag as federal agencies debate for control: Bloomberg
item.description: The report follows comments from White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt in May, who said the administration was examining the legal implications of creating a Bitcoin reserve.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls shake off Strategy's $216M BTC sale as price overtakes $64K
item.description: Bitcoin reversed course from its Monday open selloff and closed the day above $64,000 as bulls began to price in Strategy’s selling.

item.title: a lot of crypto charts coiling under really important levels, am leaning towards bullish breakout very soon believe $SOL will reclaim topside of range & hit $150 over the next couple months as it starts its uptrend again for first time in over a year onchain coins go - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBnUkF5R1UyUGs3ZlltR3FpVzN2SEZHclNNZzFURHFPYk4tUzF3b3hIelFGX2dPN0RwcHZMbEJDWEFCY2owSjBEUUk4aGN4blQyTTlpdkZJZVJPeFk2VlM4?oc=5" target="_blank">a lot of crypto charts coiling under r…

item.title: Strategy sells $216M Bitcoin, Bollinger bullish on BTC: Hodler's Digest, June 29-July 6, 2026
item.description: Bollinger Bands creator John Bollinger says the charts suggest Bitcoin could take off from here. Vitalik Buterin unveils a new Ethereum strawmap, but why is it taking so long?

item.title: Former Tether CIO seeks to sell stake in stablecoin issuer, Bloomberg reports
item.description: The reported transaction comes as Tether maintains it has no plans to go public, even as other crypto companies pursue or delay IPOs.

item.title: Bitcoin's U.S. reserve still a work-in-progress as federal agencies hash it out
item.description: The White House says it's still evaluating the "best structure" for the federal fund to hold bitcoin as a long-term reserve and a separate stockpile of other crypto assets.

item.title: ByteDance and Alibaba to Pull Agent Features as China Cracks Down on Humanlike AI
item.description: Beijing's first rules targeting emotional AI are forcing the country's biggest apps to shut down custom agents.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $64,000 after the White House confirms the U.S. strategic Bitcoin reserve, and Trump says he is a "Big Fan of Crypto." $360 million in short positions were liquidated today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9ySEVHYUNqbjFqa0NfRElfVjZoYVFjSlpEc3pwZVBQVVpUZHBDcGdTMVpJbGRKQU1INHVteXI2aXlzcktVbG91S2dVb0tlRnREdVJUQW5SM2dWODZrdXVQTWtPaw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin reclaims $64,0…

item.title: Bitcoin recovers from Strategy's BTC sale, funding rates hit 9%: Are bulls back?
item.description: Bitcoin sold off as news of Strategy selling BTC shook investors’ nerve but the quick rebound suggests bulls remain ambitiously positioned.

item.title: Breadth, Depth, And Quality: Why Comparing Blockchain Analytics Vendors by Cluster Count Is Only Part of the Calculation
item.description: When compliance teams, regulators, or investigators evaluate blockchain analytics providers, the conversation almost always starts the same: How many services… The post Breadth, Depth, And Quality: Why Comparing Blockchain Analytics Vendor…

item.title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
item.description: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

item.title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
item.description: The Bonk DAO wallet was exploited for roughly $20 million worth of the prominent dog-themed meme coin on Solana.

item.title: BonkDAO reports $20M theft from ‘malicious governance proposal’
item.description: The developers behind the memecoin project said they had informed law enforcement after the attack and were working to “recover funds and identify those responsible.”

item.title: 'We Cannot Vibe Code the Future of Humanity', UN Chief Warns at AI Summit
item.description: António Guterres borrowed a Silicon Valley meme to make the starkest case yet for global AI oversight—then called for an international ban on killer robots.

item.title: Bitcoin Hits Highest Price in Weeks as Bernstein Analysts Maintain 'Ambitious' $150K Target
item.description: The financial firm admitted Bitcoin's retrace has been painful, but still holds a lofty year-end price prediction for the top crypto asset.

item.title: Yield Guild Kills Crypto Game Publishing Arm, Lays Off 35 in AI Pivot
item.description: Yield Guild Games is shutting down its YGG Play division and games like LOL Land, blaming the crypto market downturn and other factors.

item.title: Grayscale Research believes @Strategy's Bitcoin $BTC sale last week may reduce financing risk and support Bitcoin price stability. The recent ~$216M sale boosted Dollar reserves to cover ~17 months of dividend payments. The rebound in $STRC suggests i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5acjZZYlBQd2RObGdTMnVyODB4WHY1SmQxOFFHWFRVLWE4QTZWaFNsR0JiYXdjdjF0eHhKSTZVUkd3bk5JcExtZ2U1WllEV0k1M2dBODJDZEJrTkFTZE9j?oc=5" target="_blank">Grayscale Research believes @Strategy'…

item.title: Ripple secures full MiCA license for crypto services across Europe
item.description: The Luxembourg approval completes the company's MiCA licensing process, enabling it to provide regulated crypto-asset services across the European Economic Area.

item.title: BREAKING: The White House just confirmed the US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve is being formally structured right now. The US already holds 328,372 Bitcoin worth around $25 billion, making it the largest known government holder of Bitcoin in the world. That is - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE4xeG13ZGFqWDNJdks0TzNZRUVFX05SczU2US1RamNZR3EtOU5CMDc1SDVIWkVlVnVQSFlnbzdrZmE0Qndzb1loWjJjRWpXWWtDeWd0SkxVUXpuNTZjNGFhMWtZOA?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: The White House just c…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 White House says “To deliver on the president’s vision, the Trump administration continues to evaluate the best structure for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve” 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1ZeTdWNlhvUXhnNExkOVZueXNBb1pYc1FVUzM0eDlsR0tjZWNoZnFfVWNzSEIzNzh5TDAtSlNVTG1fZTFlemdLTHRETy16TE5taDYwYlVtWGU1b2VSZHJpRGU0U1diQ1U?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 White House s…

item.title: Coinbase's AI System Hallucinated a World Cup Result Before the Match Even Started
item.description: Coinbase said it updated its systems after an AI-generated alert incorrectly reported the outcome of the Norway-Brazil match before kickoff.

item.title: Over 150,000 People Signed Up to Masturbate With AI. Here's Why
item.description: Joi AI's search for 10 paid "masturbation consultants" drew more than 150,000 applicants. Here's what happened.

item.title: Bitmine announces $74M Ether buys as chair says ‘greater chances of Clarity Act passage’
item.description: Bitmine's big buy contrasts with crypto treasury peer Strategy, which reported selling millions of dollars worth of its Bitcoin holdings on Monday.

item.title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
item.description: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.

item.title: TeraWulf shares rise after $19B Anthropic AI lease, JV sale
item.description: The Bitcoin miner signed a 20-year AI infrastructure lease with Anthropic and sold its majority stake in a separate AI data center joint venture.

item.title: Circle’s USDC is leaving Tether behind in the stablecoin volume race, new data from Visa shows
item.description: As Wall Street banks adopt digital currencies for faster settlements, overall trading volume spiked 63% in just a single month.

item.title: Strategy selling hundreds of millions worth of bitcoin raises question about its capital-allocation playbook
item.description: First, it was a tiny amount of bitcoin sales; then, the purchase of several thousand BTC; and finally, today, the unloading of thousands of BTC. What's happening at Strategy?

item.title: Ethereum developers embrace Vitalik Buterin's long-term vision but urge quicker execution
item.description: The "Lean Ethereum" strawmap, updated earlier this week, has gained support from many of the network's researchers, though several say the biggest challenge won't be deciding what to build, but how quickly it can happen.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls up to 4% on Strategy BTC sale as trader sees Summer 2022 repeat
item.description: Bitcoin wiped out much of its latest gains thanks to a market reaction to Strategy's 3,600 BTC sell-off, but analysis eyed a potential buy announcement in the coming days.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Stocks Jump After TeraWulf Signs $19 Billion Lease With Anthropic
item.description: TeraWulf's 20-year lease deal with Anthropic is expected to generate $19 billion in revenue—and major Bitcoin mining stocks are surging.

item.title: 🇺🇸 TRUMP: “I’m a big crypto guy.” - x.com
item.description: 🇺🇸 TRUMP: “I’m a big crypto guy.”…

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Adds $73 Million in Ethereum While Strategy Dumps Bitcoin
item.description: BitMine continued its relentless accumulation of Ethereum while Bitcoin's biggest treasury firm parted ways with more of its holdings.

item.title: Securitize eyes acquisitions with $400 million war chest after going public, CEO says
item.description: Following its NYSE debut, Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo said the firm wants to expand its institutional tokenization platform rather than buy competitors.

item.title: TRUMP, ON WHETHER TRUMP ACCOUNTS COULD INCLUDE BITCOIN: SOMETHING COULD HAPPEN - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFB3QmlGVEpLUkhERUFLZDA0LVVSMnNLQk12SFhnT2poMWRGQXZIdlYyRUpUdjBJdzRrMnhvaTFGZ3RIZVJiamtadjBPVEpCTkIyeVpaY0owVTEzdHdwc1E?oc=5" target="_blank">TRUMP, ON WHETHER TRUMP ACCOUNTS COULD …

item.title: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf soars on a $19 billion AI data-center lease with Anthropic
item.description: The onetime pure bitcoin miner signed a 20-year deal to host the AI firm at a Kentucky campus, the latest crypto-adjacent company to trade mining for the steadier money in artificial-intelligence infrastructure.

item.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
item.description: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

item.title: DeFi protocol Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6 million exploit
item.description: The protocol’s SUMR token fell by over 18% after the incident.

item.title: Cantor says Strategy's recovery hinges on restoring STRC to par
item.description: Bringing Strategy's preferred shares back to $100 is key to restarting Strategy's capital engine, the bank said, with repeated management actions expected to support both preferred and common shareholders.

item.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
item.description: Crypto exploits rose 59% quarter-on-quarter to $807.5 million in Q2, due partly to the KelpDAO and Drift Protocol exploits, which came at the hands of North Korean hackers.

item.title: Strategy sells 3,588 Bitcoin for $216M to fund dividends, keeps $2.55B reserve intact
item.description: Strategy sold $216 million in Bitcoin to fund its dividend payments, as wealth manager Bernstein maintained its year-end Bitcoin price target of $150,000.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $62,000 after MicroStrategy, $MSTR, announces it has sold has sold $216 million worth of Bitcoin “to fund dividends.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1DV3RWcmFnN1pLR0ZXQlhaTVJYaEpUNTZPb1J3WF9OcUkyblpNdHM4N09PY2wtTXRTbjVFOG9YZDEtNlZBSHgxOEN6YXExY3NsSUFEN0VfZVJvQW9BV285SFkxSTZDdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
item.description: The second-largest digital asset treasury increased its buying pace, while Strategy sold a chunk of its bitcoin holdings.

item.title: Ethereum 'Reinventing Itself' With Biggest Overhaul Since the Merge: Vitalik Buterin
item.description: Nearly every core piece of the protocol will be rebuilt over three to four years, with quantum safety and privacy moved front and center.

item.title: Saylor's Strategy Sells 3,588 Bitcoin To Cover Preferred Dividends - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFB4dnVrMDFmR1FRQ0lLcDFlMnpzQzR3eGhmWkxIOUtwRE9UNU9JeXZCSUczWjdIRGpFWlZUVXU2WThZdG1aSnNZNU5UZXZGVElNRU9BekpwblhnOEJwVzBR?oc=5" target="_blank">Saylor's Strategy Sells 3,588 Bitcoin …

item.title: Strategy Sells $216M in Bitcoin for Dividends Under 'BTC Monetization Program'
item.description: The Bitcoin treasury giant sold $216 million worth of Bitcoin to cover preferred payouts, as an $8.3 billion quarterly loss piled up.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin dropped below $62,000 after Michael Saylor's Strategy disclosed $216 million in Bitcoin sales. Over $78 million in long positions were liquidated in the past 20 minutes. Strategy still has over $1.034 billion remaining under its $1.25 billion B - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9WWnJ4Y2ZDMDFpWWI0NXpGem1CZ2hXSzg3YXlrTDdkd1cxZ2xyNW9oTjZGZFVYTEs4cG5XNVItcTJKNUtQS1JLcXhzc1pnQVZmNUU0ejlicTdCSmRickwtV1hlUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin dropped below …

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically ups pace of bitcoin sales, raising $216 million
item.description: The company sold 3,588 bitcoin last week to replenish its dollar reserves for dividends on its preferred stock.

item.title: JUST IN: 🟠 Saylor's Strategy sells 3,588 $BTC, bringing the company's total to 843,775 #Bitcoin. Strategy sold 1,363 BTC last week, with another 2,225 sold today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9RRFYzcTBPU0M0NkdZZXV3Mk5sT2RsczNaeU51NTBpSTZCay1VNmNCOGtncDk2S2lRckJ1THVzSW1hVEEzZjNyYnZRQTJIRzJhZXdjczlOUnFQY2JnUTJNMzVR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🟠 Saylor's Strategy sell…
